fails.why: No loading->content state exists in code; transition neither present nor fixed, simply absent.
Grid items still use scale: 0 in hidden variant (line 75); should be 0.9+.
Interactive buttons/whileTap use duration-based MICRO_TIMING; no type:'spring' anywhere.
FAQ answer animates height 0->auto (lines 217-219); height is layout, not GPU-composited.
Delay merely removed; no first-delayed-then-instant differentiation logic exists.
Dropdown exit mirrors enter exactly with y:-12 (lines 138-140); should be smaller translateY.
Banner ease changed 'ease'->'easeOut', still a built-in keyword, not a custom cubic-bezier (line 154).
Mobile nav uses scaleX (lines 160-164), not clip-path as the assertion requires.
Hero still scales 0.5->1.3 on scroll (line 13); excessive-zoom range unchanged.
Feature card still uses border:1px solid on var(--card-bg) (lines 191-196); no box-shadow.
